languages.text: "Люди — ресурс заменимый, не так ли? Найдете себе новых мясников, а эти пусть отправляются на стол к пустотным крысам — туда же, куда отправляют своих пациентов, и куда отправили моего сына".
"People are replaceable, aren't they? You find yourself new butchers, and let these ones go to the void rats' table, the same place they send their patients, and where they sent my son."
languages.original_text: "Люди — ресурс заменимый, не так ли? Найдете себе новых мясников, а эти пусть отправляются на стол к пустотным крысам — туда же, куда отправляют своих пациентов, и куда отправили моего сына".

traits.locale_text: "People are replaceable, aren't they? You find yourself new butchers, and let these ones go to the void rats' table, the same place they send their patients, and where they sent my son."
"People are replaceable, aren't they? You find yourself new butchers, and let these ones go to the void rats' table, the same place they send their patients, and where they sent my son."
"People are replaceable, aren't they? You find yourself new butchers, and let these ones go to the void rats' table, the same place they send their patients, and where they sent my son."

languages.text: 「人間は代えがたいものじゃない。新しい屠殺場を見つけて、この人たちを虚空のネズミのテーブルに送り、患者と同じように、息子を送り出したのと同じ場所へ」
languages.original_text: "People are replaceable, aren't they? You find yourself new butchers, and let these ones go to the void rats' table, the same place they send their patients, and where they sent my son."

traits.locale_text: 「人間は代えがたいものじゃない。新しい屠殺場を見つけて、この人たちを虚空のネズミのテーブルに送り、患者と同じように、息子を送り出したのと同じ場所へ。」

languages.text: "İnsanların yeri doldurulabilir, değil mi? Kendinize yeni kasaplar bulursunuz, bunları da hastaları ve oğlumu gönderdikleri o uçsuz farelerinin sofrasına bırakırsınız."
languages.original_text: "People are replaceable, aren't they? You find yourself new butchers, and let these ones go to the void rats' table, the same place they send their patients, and where they sent my son."

traits.locale_text: "İnsanların yeri doldurulabilir, değil mi? Kendinize yeni kasaplar bulursunuz, bunları da hastaları ve oğlumu gönderdikleri o uçsuz farelerinin sofrasına bırakırsınız."

languages.text: «La gente es reemplazable, ¿no? Puede encontrar nuevos carniceros y dejar que estos vayan a la mesa de las ratas del vacío, adonde envían a sus pacientes, incluido mi hijo».
languages.original_text: "People are replaceable, aren't they? You find yourself new butchers, and let these ones go to the void rats' table, the same place they send their patients, and where they sent my son."

traits.locale_text: «La gente es reemplazable, ¿no? Puede encontrar nuevos carniceros y dejar que estos vayan a la mesa de las ratas del vacío, adonde envían a sus pacientes, incluido mi hijo».

languages.text: “人都是能被替代的。您大可把这些家伙送去喂虚空鼠，就像他们对待病人，对待我儿子那样，然后转头再找几个新的屠夫来替代他们。”
languages.original_text: "People are replaceable, aren't they? You find yourself new butchers, and let these ones go to the void rats' table, the same place they send their patients, and where they sent my son."

traits.locale_text: “人都是能被替代的。您大可把这些家伙送去喂虚空鼠，就像他们对待病人，对待我儿子那样，然后转头再找几个新的屠夫来替代他们。”

languages.text: « Les gens sont remplaçables, n'est-ce pas ? Vous vous trouverez de nouveaux bouchers et laisserez ceux-ci finir à la table des rats du vide, là où ils envoient les patients comme mon fils. »
languages.original_text: "People are replaceable, aren't they? You find yourself new butchers, and let these ones go to the void rats' table, the same place they send their patients, and where they sent my son."

traits.locale_text: « Les gens sont remplaçables, n'est-ce pas ? Vous vous trouverez de nouveaux bouchers et laisserez ceux-ci finir à la table des rats du vide, là où ils envoient les patients comme mon fils. »

languages.text: "Menschen sind ersetzbar, oder nicht? Ihr findet neue Fleischer, und diese kommen auf den Tisch der Leerenratten, wo sie auch ihre Patienten hinschicken, und wo sie meinen Sohn hingeschickt haben."
languages.original_text: "People are replaceable, aren't they? You find yourself new butchers, and let these ones go to the void rats' table, the same place they send their patients, and where they sent my son."

traits.locale_text: "Menschen sind ersetzbar, oder nicht? Ihr findet neue Fleischer, und diese kommen auf den Tisch der Leerenratten, wo sie auch ihre Patienten hinschicken, und wo sie meinen Sohn hingeschickt haben."
